## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential SEO and content marketing partnership between GrowthX and Pylon Lending](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Pylon seeks technical SEO audit and long-term content strategy to establish market voice](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX offers AI-powered, expert-guided content creation from strategy to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Pylon's complex mortgage industry requires careful balance of AI efficiency and domain expertise](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)
  - [GrowthX's process involves deep strategy sprint, custom workflows, and expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)

## Topics

### Pylon's Current Marketing Situation

  - [Brett joined Pylon 4 months ago to lead marketing from zero to one](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Limited marketing resources, exploring ways to test and scale various channels](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Website built by agency with technical SEO challenges to address](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)
  - [Content mostly created by Brett, with short-term freelancer engagement planned](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Leads split \~50/50 between inbound (press, LinkedIn) and outbound efforts](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)

### Pylon's Product and Market

  - [Vertically integrated mortgage origination infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=529.0)
  - [Automates human-dependent processes in traditional mortgage creation](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=569.0)
  - [Two main market segments:](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
    1.  Companies switching to Pylon
    2.  Companies entering mortgage origination (12-18 month sales cycle)
  - [Four sub-segments: mortgage brokers, non-delegated banks, delegated banks, retail banks](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Current focus on broker segment with 15% positive outbound reply rate](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=905.0)
  - [Key value props: competitive pricing, greater control over mortgage manufacturing](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=919.0)

### GrowthX's Approach and Offerings

  - [AI-powered content creation with expert oversight](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Addresses shift from SEO to GEO (Generative Engine Optimization)](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Comprehensive service: strategy, content creation, CMS publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Founded by Marcel (ex-IBM, HP, HashiCorp, Scale) based on organic content engine success](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Process involves deep strategy sprint to inform AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1418.0)
  - [Expert team includes former TechCrunch, Fanatics, TripAdvisor, G2 leaders](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1436.0)
  - [Custom workflows can incorporate client SME knowledge (e.g., Biologica's medical officer)](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1499.0)

### Content Creation Process and Quality Assurance

  - [Develops detailed personas and topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1688.0)
  - [Uses sophisticated AI workflows for research, drafting, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1885.0)
  - [Multiple steps ensure accuracy, comprehensiveness, and relevance](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [Expert-in-the-loop can make real-time adjustments](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1928.0)
  - [Leverages objective third-party sources for validation](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1958.0)
  - [Fact-checking process with confidence interval and rewrite suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1969.0)

### Case Studies and Results

  - [Engine (travel): Created industry-specific personas](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1674.0)
  - [Town (accounting): Compliance guide for real estate professionals](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1743.0)
  - [Augment Code: 10x organic traffic growth in 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Airbyte: Detailed workflow example shared](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1823.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send follow-up information and demo materials](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [Schedule a more in-depth demo and Q\&A session](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [Brett to review materials and prepare specific questions for next discussion](https://fathom.video/share/_A3GmnkSDV7CkMREuv1wYEqNyb4VX12H?tab=summary&timestamp=1987.0)
